input.user_input: Is there a force majeure clause? Does it cover pandemics or government-ordered shutdowns?

actual: I do not have access to any documents to review. Please upload the contract or agreement you are asking about, and I will gladly check if it contains a force majeure clause and whether it specifically covers pandemics or government-ordered shutdowns.
